meta_description: New tariff refund portal goes live Monday as first phase of court-ordered compliance. Billions in potential refunds explained.
excerpt: A new federal tariff refund portal launches Monday, April 21st, 2026, to process billions of dollars in reimbursements. The initiative follows court orders finding certain tariff collections violated legal requirements, marking the first phase of potentially one of the largest government refund programs in recent history.

title: Trump's Disapproval Surges as Iran War Drags On
meta_description: NBC News poll shows Trump's approval at 37% as Iran conflict remains unpopular. Disapproval ratings climb amid ongoing peace negotiations.
excerpt: A new NBC News poll reveals President Trump's job approval has fallen to just 37% amid the ongoing Iran conflict. The survey shows 61% of Americans disapprove of the administration's military strategy in Iran, with economic concerns and lengthy peace negotiations driving public dissatisfaction. Trump's disapproval rating has reached historic highs during his tenure as the unpopular war continues to dominate public opinion.

title: China Holds Lending Rates as Growth Accelerates Amid Mideast Tensions
meta_description: China maintains benchmark lending rates unchanged as economic growth strengthens. Economists push back interest rate cut forecasts amid Middle East geopolitical risks.
excerpt: China's central bank held benchmark lending rates steady as robust economic growth reduces near-term stimulus needs. Economists have pushed back forecasts for interest rate cuts, citing both strong domestic fundamentals and emerging Middle East geopolitical risks.

title: Trump's Disapproval Grows as Iran War Remains Unpopular

title: Obamas' Higher Ground Productions Goes Independent After Netflix Deal
meta_description: Barack and Michelle Obama's Higher Ground Productions transitions to independent company, expanding beyond Netflix to work with multiple studios.
excerpt: Former President Barack Obama announced that Higher Ground Productions is transitioning to an independent company following its Netflix deal, enabling the production company to work with multiple studios and streaming platforms. The strategic shift reflects broader industry trends toward creative autonomy and diversified distribution channels.

title: Oil prices jump as Strait of Hormuz tensions escalate
meta_description: Energy markets surge following escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz. Oil prices volatile since US-Israel military action against Iran in February 2026.
excerpt: Crude oil prices have surged above $95 per barrel as tensions escalate in the Strait of Hormuz, continuing the volatile market conditions that emerged following US and Israeli military operations against Iran in February. Energy markets face sustained uncertainty from supply chain risks and geopolitical instability in one of the world's most critical shipping routes.

title: Climate Economy Reaches $2 Trillion Milestone in 2026
meta_description: Global climate economy hits record $2 trillion as renewable energy, green tech, and sustainable finance drive unprecedented economic growth and job creation worldwide.
excerpt: The global climate economy surpassed $2 trillion in 2026, driven by record renewable energy investments, explosive EV growth, and mainstream adoption of sustainable finance. This milestone demonstrates that climate action and economic prosperity are increasingly aligned, creating millions of jobs and attracting trillions in capital worldwide.
